news.title:
Bajaj Finserv saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 55.1 cr for 328,637 shares.
The trade was executed at Rs. 1,676.30 per share.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv saw an NSE block trade worth Rs. 55.1 cr for 328,637 shares.
The trade was executed at Rs. 1,676.30 per share.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv's board to review FY26 audited results and consider dividend on April 30, 2026.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed from April 1 to May 2, 2026.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv's board to review FY26 audited results and consider dividend on April 30, 2026.
Trading window for designated persons remains closed from April 1 to May 2, 2026.

news.title:
LIC, HDFC Life, Bajaj Finserv, ICICI Pru hit 52-week lows amid a 14%-24% monthly decline.
IRDAI reforms, digital transformation, and product innovation may drive long-term recovery in insurance.
news.summary:
LIC, HDFC Life, Bajaj Finserv, ICICI Pru hit 52-week lows amid a 14%-24% monthly decline.
IRDAI reforms, digital transformation, and product innovation may drive long-term recovery in insurance.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal initiates coverage on Bajaj Finserv with 'Neutral' rating, citing balanced risk-reward and growth potential.
Target price set at ₹1,900; FY26-28 CAGR: PAT 17%, revenue 15%, RoE 13-14%. Insurance and digital growth critical.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal initiates coverage on Bajaj Finserv with 'Neutral' rating, citing balanced risk-reward and growth potential.
Target price set at ₹1,900; FY26-28 CAGR: PAT 17%, revenue 15%, RoE 13-14%. Insurance and digital growth critical.

news.title:
RBI clarifies no plans for tenure limits on NBFCs' top management.
This puts focus on Bajaj Finance and Shriram Finance.
news.summary:
RBI clarifies no plans for tenure limits on NBFCs' top management.
This puts focus on Bajaj Finance and Shriram Finance.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv reports Nifty 500 profits rose 16% YoY in Q3 FY26, supporting Indian equities.
AI adoption impacts Indian IT demand; crude oil risks intensify due to West Asia tensions.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv reports Nifty 500 profits rose 16% YoY in Q3 FY26, supporting Indian equities.
AI adoption impacts Indian IT demand; crude oil risks intensify due to West Asia tensions.

news.title:
Bajaj General Insurance gross premium for Feb '26: ₹1,094.04 cr; YTD: ₹21,794.23 cr.
Bajaj Life Insurance new business premium for Feb '26: ₹1,281.28 cr; YTD: ₹12,302.32 cr.
news.summary:

news.title:
Kotak Institutional Equities rates Bajaj Finance ADD with target of 1100/share.
Strong growth and sustainable RoE expected despite large balance sheet.
news.summary:
Kotak Institutional Equities rates Bajaj Finance ADD with target of 1100/share.
Strong growth and sustainable RoE expected despite large balance sheet.

news.title:
India's Margin Trading Facility surged to ₹1.16 lakh crore by Dec 2025, up from ₹24,920 crore in FY23, per PPFAS MF.
Large bank-backed brokers dominate 50% of MTF; Zerodha, Angel One, Motilal Oswal, Bajaj Securities hold 5-6% each.
news.summary:
India's Margin Trading Facility surged to ₹1.16 lakh crore by Dec 2025, up from ₹24,920 crore in FY23, per PPFAS MF.
Large bank-backed brokers dominate 50% of MTF; Zerodha, Angel One, Motilal Oswal, Bajaj Securities hold 5-6% each.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv reports January 2026 data for its unlisted subsidiaries, Bajaj General Insurance and Bajaj Life Insurance.
Gross direct premium for Bajaj General Insurance was Rs 1,821.05 crore, while Bajaj Life Insurance reported new business premiums of Rs 1,190.97 crore.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv reports January 2026 data for its unlisted subsidiaries, Bajaj General Insurance and Bajaj Life Insurance.
Gross direct premium for Bajaj General Insurance was Rs 1,821.05 crore, while Bajaj Life Insurance reported new business premiums of Rs 1,190.97 crore.

news.title: Bajaj Finserv released its investor presentation for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 2025.
news.summary: Bajaj Finserv released its investor presentation for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 2025.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv reports Q3 net profit of ₹4,066 crore, down 5.6% YoY.
Net interest income rises 20.6% YoY to ₹11,318 crore.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv reports Q3 net profit of ₹4,066 crore, down 5.6% YoY.
Net interest income rises 20.6% YoY to ₹11,318 crore.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv announced the resignation of Shri Purav Jhaveri, President - Investments, effective 31 Jan 2026.
The resignation was submitted to pursue external career opportunities; disclosures were made as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv announced the resignation of Shri Purav Jhaveri, President - Investments, effective 31 Jan 2026.
The resignation was submitted to pursue external career opportunities; disclosures were made as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv acquired remaining 50% stake in BFDL from Allianz SE for INR 12.5 crore.
This acquisition makes Bajaj Finserv the sole owner, ending the joint venture agreement.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv acquired remaining 50% stake in BFDL from Allianz SE for INR 12.5 crore.
This acquisition makes Bajaj Finserv the sole owner, ending the joint venture agreement.

Bajaj Finserv, BHEL, HUL, NHPC, Voltas, Elecon Engineering shares in focus.

news.title:
Bajaj Group ups stake to 75% in insurance arms with Rs 21,390 Cr deal; Bajaj Finserv now holds 97%.
BHEL got Rs 5,400 Cr order; HUL received Rs 1,560 Cr tax demand; NHPC to raise Rs 2,000 Cr via private placement.
news.summary:
Bajaj Group ups stake to 75% in insurance arms with Rs 21,390 Cr deal; Bajaj Finserv now holds 97%.
BHEL got Rs 5,400 Cr order; HUL received Rs 1,560 Cr tax demand; NHPC to raise Rs 2,000 Cr via private placement.

news.title:
Stocks to watch: Bharat Forge, Vedanta, RVNL, BHEL, Bajaj Finserv; key updates include order wins, results, stake sales.
Bajaj Finserv ups stake in insurance units; Bharat Forge partners Agile Robots for AI automation; Vedanta files court petition.
news.summary:
Stocks to watch: Bharat Forge, Vedanta, RVNL, BHEL, Bajaj Finserv; key updates include order wins, results, stake sales.
Bajaj Finserv ups stake in insurance units; Bharat Forge partners Agile Robots for AI automation; Vedanta files court petition.

news.title:
Bajaj Finserv acquired 23% stake from Allianz SE in insurance units for Rs. 21,390 crore.
This raises Bajaj's ownership to 97%, ending its joint venture with Allianz SE.
news.summary:
Bajaj Finserv acquired 23% stake from Allianz SE in insurance units for Rs. 21,390 crore.
This raises Bajaj's ownership to 97%, ending its joint venture with Allianz SE.
